string.name: http_response_error
string.value: Request error, please check if there is a network.

string.name: permission_description_internet
string.value: Allow applications to access web API using the Internet network.

string.name: permission_description_vibration
string.value: This permission allows your app to make the device vibrate

string.name: permission_description_notification
string.value: This permission allows your app to display notifications

string.name: permission_description_background_running
string.value: This permission allows your app to receive data while in background
